name: build-android-apps
description: Build Android apps with workflows for emulator and device mirroring in the Codex in-app browser, selector automation, previews, and runtime debugging.

interface.shortDescription: Mirror, inspect, automate, preview, and debug Android apps from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use Build Android Apps to open adb-connected Android emulators or devices in the Codex in-app browser, automate visible UI through screenshots and accessibility selectors, inspect activity and logcat state, capture proof bundles, and launch React Native, Expo, Jetpack Compose, or Android XML preview hosts.
defaultPrompt: Mirror and debug an Android app in the Codex browser.
